commit.message:
fix: 7z listing shows archive itself + missing entries (3 parsing bugs)

1. Archive metadata block misread as file entry
   7z l -slt outputs a metadata block first (Path = archive.7z, Type = 7z...)
   followed by the first "----------". The old code yielded that block as a
   file entry, causing the .7z file itself to appear in the listing.
   Fix: skip yield on the first "----------" (pastHeader flag).

2. Windows backslashes broke subdirectory grouping
   7z on Windows outputs "folder\file.txt" with backslashes. ListDirectory
   splits on '/' so nested entries weren't grouped → most files missing.
   Fix: normalise '\' to '/' in ReadEntries.

3. Folder = + not handled
   .7z archives mark directories with "Folder = +" not just "Attributes = D".
   Fix: handle the Folder key alongside Attributes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: post-render foreignObject height correction for Mermaid nodes

Mermaid measures label height at full page width (no wrapping).
In narrow SVG foreignObjects, text wraps → needs more height than measured.
After mermaid.run(), resize each foreignObject to its actual scrollHeight
and shift it + the node rect to stay vertically centered.

Fix schema enum format for scan_color (v1.1.3)

HAOS add-on schema enums use list(val1|val2|val3) syntax, not
"val1|val2|val3". The quoted string format caused the Supervisor to
silently reject the entire add-on config, making it invisible in the
store even though the repository loaded correctly.

Initial release — XCPlaylist v1.0.0

Lightning-fast ad-free IPTV player with Xtream Codes support.

Features:
- Live TV, VOD, and Series playback via Xtream Codes API
- HEVC/H.265 support via mpegts.js, HLS via HLS.js
- Server-side FFmpeg audio transcoding (AC3/EAC3/DTS → AAC)
- Auto-detection of unsupported audio codecs with automatic fix
- EPG (Electronic Program Guide) with full XMLTV support
- Format cycling (TS, HLS, MP4) with per-stream memory
- Favorites, watch history, continue watching, reminders
- Channel zapping (up/down arrows)
- macOS native titlebar with traffic lights
- Windows support with NSIS installer
- Cross-platform FFmpeg bundling via extraResources

- Payments tab: beneficiary list + recent payments

Home is the default landing screen. Chat is omnipresent via FAB.
Pre-login state (login screen) has no tabs/FAB visible.
Onboarding: FAB auto-opens on first launch for new users.

EXI-14 (Home screen), EXI-15 (Payments screen). EX total 47→50 tasks.

Harden reliability, redesign dashboard, fix VS Code extension

- Atomic file writes to prevent queue corruption from concurrent hooks
- Hook logging to ~/.claude/claude-queue.log with timestamps
- Hook timeout 5s → 10s, case-insensitive hook detection (fixes duplicates)
- Stale job auto-prune after 24h
- Dashboard redesign: colour-coded cards, waiting-time counters, desktop
  notifications, focus/dismiss buttons, 2s polling
- VS Code extension: fix fragile path escaping (base64 data attributes),
  case-insensitive matching, section labels, 2s polling
- Tray app stripped to essentials (Open Dashboard / Quit), auto-opens browser
- Windows Task Scheduler auto-start support (npm run autostart)
- Clean up test artifacts, expand window focus skip-list

commit.message:
Mobiel-first scanner: 20 parallel scanners, 2000px kwaliteit, geen desktop/mobiel verschil

- scanner-image-utils: alle isMobile() branching verwijderd, uniforme limieten
  - 20 concurrent scanners, 2000px product images, 1280px API, 28 semaphore slots
  - 400 max memory images, 8192² max pixels, 50MB file limit
- scanner-content: stagger 80-300ms (was 150-800), 8 per cycle (was 5)
  - Dynamic scaling: 18 bij >50 items, 14 bij >150 (was 8-12 mobiel)
  - Lightweight trigger >60 items (was 15 mobiel), coupling delay 3s (was 5s)
  - Auto-push parallel: 4 (was 2 mobiel), skipEnhance=true bij uploads
- scan-proxy: API_MAX_CONCURRENT 12 (was 8), queue timeout 15s, inflight 90s

Add daily digest summary and fix YouTube/URL title extraction

  title; add <title> tag fallback with site-name suffix stripping; normalize
  www.reddit.com to old.reddit.com for SSR HTML; trigger headless fallback
  when title is missing (not just when text is short)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent UTC timezone shift on date-only fields across all views

YYYY-MM-DD strings parsed with new Date() create midnight UTC, which
displays as the previous day in US timezones. Fixed by appending
T00:00:00 or parsing date components directly to create local dates.

Affected: database table, board tabs, form display, inbox table.
